title: ProtocolStats
description: Comprehensive Liquity V2 (BOLD) protocol statistics snapshot including totals, per-branch metrics, yield opportunities, and token prices.

total_bold_supply.description: Total BOLD stablecoin supply as a decimal numeric string.

total_debt_pending.description: Total pending debt across all collateral branches as a decimal numeric string.

total_coll_value.description: Total collateral value in USD across all branches as a decimal numeric string.

total_sp_deposits.description: Total stability pool deposits as a decimal numeric string.

total_value_locked.description: Total value locked in the protocol as a decimal numeric string.

max_sp_apy.description: Maximum stability pool APY across all collateral branches as a decimal numeric string.

branch.description: Per-collateral branch statistics. Keys are asset names (e.g., WETH, wstETH, rETH).

boldYield.description: List of BOLD yield opportunities across DeFi protocols.

prices.description: Current token prices keyed by symbol.

additionalProperties.description: Token price as a decimal numeric string.

BranchStats.title: BranchStats
BranchStats.description: Per-collateral branch statistics for a Liquity V2 deployment.

coll_active.description: Active collateral amount as numeric string.

coll_default.description: Defaulted collateral amount as numeric string.

coll_price.description: Current collateral price as numeric string.

debt_recorded.description: Recorded debt amount as numeric string.

debt_default.description: Defaulted debt amount as numeric string.

sp_deposits.description: Stability pool deposit amount as numeric string.

interest_accrual_1y.description: Annualized interest accrual as numeric string.

interest_pending.description: Pending interest amount as numeric string.

batch_management_fees_pending.description: Pending batch management fees as numeric string.

coll_value.description: Total collateral value in USD as numeric string.

value_locked.description: Total value locked as numeric string.

interest_rate_avg.description: Average interest rate as numeric string.

sp_apy.description: Stability pool APY as numeric string.

sp_apy_avg_1d.description: 1-day average stability pool APY as numeric string.

sp_apy_avg_7d.description: 7-day average stability pool APY as numeric string.

YieldVenue.title: YieldVenue
YieldVenue.description: A yield opportunity for BOLD in a DeFi protocol.

weekly_apr.description: Weekly annualized percentage rate as decimal.

total_apr.description: Total APR range as formatted string.
